---
title: "Video companion title"
description: "Replace this sentence with a concise account of the video."
date: 2026-07-16
author: "Mohan Rajendran"
categories: [Everyone, Exposition]
image: ../../../assets/kolam-field.svg
image-alt: "Replace this with a description of the video thumbnail"
audience: [everyone]
kind: video
featured: false
draft: true
toc: true
---

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VIDEO_ID >}}

## Extended description

Describe the mathematical journey of the video and what the viewer should watch for.

## Key ideas and timestamps

- **00:00** — Opening question

## References and further reading

Add books, papers, websites and related Math Nomad pages here.

## Corrections and updates

Record any correction or development after publication. Delete this section if it is not needed.
